/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json, pandas as pd
state=json.load(open('../state.json'))
print('STATE_DATE', state.get('current_date'))
print('RESOLUTION_EVENTS', len(state.get('resolution_events', [])))
for ev in state.get('resolution_events', [])[-12:]:
    print('EV', ev)
market=pd.read_csv('market.csv')
active=market[~market.is_resolved.astype(bool)].copy()
print('ROWS', len(market), 'ACTIVE', len(active), 'RESOLVED', market.is_resolved.astype(bool).sum())
print(active[['qid','resolution_date','title','market_aggregate']].sort_values(['resolution_date','qid']).to_string(index=False, max_colwidth=180))
PY"

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json, pandas as pd
state=json.load(open('../state.json'))
print('STATE_DATE', state.get('current_date'))
print('RESOLUTION_EVENTS', len(state.get('resolution_events', [])))
for ev in state.get('resolution_events', [])[-12:]:
    print('EV', ev)
market=pd.read_csv('market.csv')
active=market[~market.is_resolved.astype(bool)].copy()
print('ROWS', len(market), 'ACTIVE', len(active), 'RESOLVED', market.is_resolved.astype(bool).sum())
print(active[['qid','resolution_date','title','market_aggregate']].sort_values(['resolution_date','qid']).to_string(index=False, max_colwidth=180))
PY"

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
arts=[]
for line in Path('articles/2026/03/17/articles.jsonl').open(errors='ignore'):
    if line.strip():
        try: arts.append(json.loads(line))
        except: pass
print('articles', len(arts))
queries={
 'q388_linyu':['Lin Yu-ting','return to the ring','World Boxing','Asian Games','boxing'],
 'q398_ai_servers':['AI servers','US-made AI','smuggling route','Southeast Asia','Hong Kong','Singapore'],
 'q512_arms':['8.4bn','8.4 billion','US arms sale','F-16','drones missiles radars','Taiwan','Middle East'],
 'q666_chuck':['Chuck Norris','hospitalized','before his death','Texas','California'],
 'q724_basij':['Basij','checkpoint','13 members','Tehran','Khash','Zahedan'],
 'q739_mayos':['Los Mayos','Sinaloa Cartel','Ismael Zambada Sicairos','Jesus Alexander Sanchez Felix','detained'],
 'q505_paris_bank':['Paris headquarters','foiled explosive attack','Societe Generale','BNP Paribas','French authorities'],
 'q144_boat':['drug-trafficking boat','survivor','remains','eastern Pacific','Ecuador','Colombia'],
 'q244_jerusalem':['missile sirens','explosion seconds','Jerusalem','West Jerusalem','Jerusalem Hills'],
 'q655_srilanka':['Sri Lanka','Mattala airport','land two combat aircraft','Iran','Israel'],
 'q668_irgc':['IRGC spokesman','funeral','Ramezan Sharif'],
 'q757_toddler':['toddler','rescued from rubble','airstrike','White Helmets','Palestinian Civil Defence'],
 'q217_sudan_hospital':['teaching hospital','Sudan','North Darfur','South Darfur'],
 'q427_massgrave':['mass grave','dozens of bodies','including children','exhumed','Syria','Iraq'],
 'q974_eritrea':['Eritrea','Eswatini','qualifying','Benghazi','Asmara']
}
for name,terms in queries.items():
    hits=[]
    for a in arts:
        text=' '.join(str(a.get(k) or '') for k in ('title','content','source'))
        low=text.lower()
        sc=sum(low.count(t.lower()) for t in terms)
        if sc:
            hits.append((sc,a))
    hits=sorted(hits,key=lambda x:x[0],reverse=True)[:8]
    print('\\n###',name,'hits',len(hits))
    for sc,a in hits:
        title=' '.join(str(a.get('title') or '').split())[:170]
        snip=' '.join(str(a.get('content') or '').split())[:420]
        print(f'[{sc}] {a.get(\"date_publish\")} {a.get(\"source\")} | {title} | {snip}')
PY"

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json, pandas as pd
state=json.load(open('../state.json'))
print('STATE_DATE', state.get('current_date'))
print('RESOLUTION_EVENTS', len(state.get('resolution_events', [])))
for ev in state.get('resolution_events', [])[-12:]:
    print('EV', ev)
market=pd.read_csv('market.csv')
active=market[~market.is_resolved.astype(bool)].copy()
print('ROWS', len(market), 'ACTIVE', len(active), 'RESOLVED', market.is_resolved.astype(bool).sum())
print(active[['qid','resolution_date','title','market_aggregate']].sort_values(['resolution_date','qid']).to_string(index=False, max_colwidth=180))
PY"
